title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at Astral Pipes Ventures Solutions

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Plant Manager at Astral Pipes Ventures Solutions
jsonLd.description:
Astral Pipes Ventures Solutions has an exciting opening for a Plant Manager at our Delhi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Astral Pipes Ventures Solutions:
Astral Pipes Ventures Solutions is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Oversee daily production operations to meet output targets
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Conduct root cause analysis for quality rejections and defects
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Astral Pipes Ventures Solutions!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
